attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.EXPEDITE_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.REQUESTOR, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.REQUEST_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.REQUEST_STATUS, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.REQUEST_PRIORITY, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.REQUEST_COMMENTS, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.RESPONSE_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.COMMIT_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.REJECT_CODE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.REJECT_REASON, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.MASTER_SCHEDULER, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.COMMIT_COMMENTS, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.ESCALATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.SEND_EMAIL, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.REQUESTING_MANAGER, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.NO_OF_SUBMISSIONS, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.EXPEDITE_ID, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.BOOKED_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.ACTION_STATUS, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.PRIORITY_ORDER, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.COMMIT_REASON, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.ISO_REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.SALESREP_ID, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.GES_PK_ID, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.REQUEST_TYPE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.EXP_REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.EXP_PRIORITY, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.LATEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES,
 (
 select GES_PK_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES
 minus
 select GES_PK_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES
 ) ACM
 where 
 COALESCE(ACM.GES_PK_ID,-999) = COALESCE(STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.GES_PK_ID,-999)  and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITES.REFRESH_DATETIME
